steps.title: Convert table values
steps.content:
Since $g(x)=\frac{f(x)}{x+2}$, multiply each $g(x)$ value by $x+2$ to find points on $f$:
$$f(-8)=0(-8+2)=0$$
$$f(10)=3(10+2)=36$$

steps.title: Find the line
steps.content:
The line $y=f(x)$ passes through $(-8,0)$ and $(10,36)$. Its slope is
$$\frac{36-0}{10-(-8)}=\frac{36}{18}=2$$
Using $f(x)=2x+b$ and $f(-8)=0$ gives
$$0=2(-8)+b$$
$$b=16$$

steps.title: Identify the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept of $y=f(x)$ is $(0,b)$, so the intercept is $(0,16)$. The answer is D.
